code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useDispatch,useSelector}from'react-redux';import{login,clearLoginError}from'../store/auth/authActions';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const LoginBlock=()=>{const dispatch=useDispatch();const error=useSelector(state=>state.auth.loginError);const[loginValue,setLoginValue]=useState('');const[passwordValue,setPasswordValue]=useState('');const handleLogin=e=>{e.preventDefault();dispatch(login(loginValue,passwordValue));};const onChangeLogin=e=>{setLoginValue(e.target.value);dispatch(clearLoginError());};const onChangePassword=e=>{setPasswordValue(e.target.value);dispatch(clearLoginError());};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"auth-block",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"\u0412\u0445\u043E\u0434"}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"error",children:error}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleLogin,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"\u041B\u043E\u0433\u0438\u043D",value:loginValue,onChange:onChangeLogin,required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"\u041F\u0430\u0440\u043E\u043B\u044C",value:passwordValue,onChange:onChangePassword,required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"\u0412\u043E\u0439\u0442\u0438"})]})]});};export default LoginBlock;
